scope: Rule-only execution; no asset generation interface

rules.name: Approved request only
rules.requirement: Only a Gate-12 Phase 1 request with status Approved and valid sign-off evidence may enter execution.

rules.name: Compatibility boundary mandatory
rules.requirement: Gate-11 Phase 2 check must run and preserve matched Rule IDs.

rules.name: Strictest decision wins
rules.requirement: Aggregate decisions using declared priority; execution may not downgrade Gate-11 output.

rules.name: Draft output only
rules.requirement: The only output is an Expansion Blueprint with designation Draft Only and state Draft.

rules.name: No asset mutation
rules.requirement: Do not create images, garments, visual assets or modify an existing asset.

rules.name: Fail closed
rules.requirement: Missing evidence, unresolved references or illegal state transitions stop execution.
